Sandbox_EnableEntryActions_tooltip: Master toggle for all forced-entry features: crowbar prying, screwdriver lockpicking, and bolt cutters. Turn this off to fully disable entry mechanics for the whole server.
Sandbox_EnablePrySystem_tooltip: Allow crowbar prying of locked doors, windows, and garage doors. Strength-based success with noise generation.
Sandbox_EnableScrewdriverLockpick_toolti: Allow using a screwdriver to quietly pick building door locks.
Sandbox_PrySuccessMultiplier_tooltip: Scales pry success chance. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double chance, 0.5 = half chance.
Sandbox_PryNoiseMultiplier_tooltip: Scales noise generated by prying. Higher values attract more zombies.
Sandbox_LockpickSuccessMultiplier_toolti: Scales lockpick success chance. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double chance.
Sandbox_LockpickNoiseMultiplier_tooltip: Scales noise from lockpicking. Default 0.4 = very quiet.
Sandbox_InjuryChance_tooltip: Chance of minor hand injury when prying or lockpicking. 0.0 = disabled, 1.0 = guaranteed.
Sandbox_ToolWearMultiplier_tooltip: Scales condition loss on crowbars, screwdrivers, and bolt cutters during entry actions.
Sandbox_EnableAlternateCanOpening_toolti: Allow opening cans and jars with knives and screwdrivers instead of a can opener.
Sandbox_CanInjuryChance_tooltip: Chance of a cut when opening cans with a knife. 0.0 = disabled.
Sandbox_EnableRepairExtensions_tooltip: Right-click damaged items to repair them. Also enables alternative repair materials like duct tape and glue.
Sandbox_EnableRepairAllClothing_tooltip: Adds a 'Repair All Clothing' right-click option that restores every worn garment to full condition and removes all sewn-on patches in one action. Costs 1 thread use, 1 needle wear, and 1 fabric strip per damaged garment. Requires Enable repair extensions.
Sandbox_EnableEquipmentQoL_tooltip: Battery swap, lighter refill, cloth tearing, bandage crafting, and other equipment shortcuts.
Sandbox_EnableCorpseIgnite_tooltip: Right-click corpses to ignite them with a lighter or matches.
Sandbox_EnablePlayerMapTracking_tooltip: Show other players on the world map and minimap in multiplayer.
Sandbox_PlayerMapVisibilityMode_tooltip: 1 = everyone sees all players, 2 = admins only, 3 = disabled.
Sandbox_EnableSeatbeltProtection_tooltip: Toggle seatbelt with Numpad + for crash damage reduction while driving.
Sandbox_EnableWalkingItemActions_tooltip: Wear and unwear clothing while walking instead of stopping.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleMechanicsQoL_toolti: Batch uninstall vehicle parts (all tires, lights, windows, doors).
Sandbox_EnableImprovisedHotwire_tooltip: Hotwire vehicles with a screwdriver when lacking Electrical/Mechanics skills or the Burglar trait.
Sandbox_EnableUnHotwire_tooltip: Add a 'Remove Hotwire' option to the vehicle radial menu when seated as driver with the engine off and a screwdriver in inventory.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleDoorPry_tooltip: Pry locked vehicle doors and hatches with a crowbar via the radial menu (V key).
Sandbox_EnableGarageDoorPry_tooltip: Allow crowbar prying on garage doors and roll-up doors.
Sandbox_EnableSafeDoorPry_tooltip: Allow prying reinforced and safe doors. Requires high Strength. Disabled by default.
Sandbox_ReinforcedDoorLevel_tooltip: Minimum Strength level required to attempt prying reinforced doors.
Sandbox_VehicleWindowShatterChance_toolt: Percent chance that a vehicle window shatters when prying a locked door.
Sandbox_EnableWashMenuSplits_tooltip: Sort the wash context menu by water requirement for easier item selection.
Sandbox_EnableDashboardHighlights_toolti: Color-tint vehicle dashboard gauges (battery, engine temp, heater) for at-a-glance status.
Sandbox_EnablePourCanContents_tooltip: Right-click open containers to pour contents on the ground.
Sandbox_EnableProximityLootHelper_toolti: Tab key opens a searchable panel showing nearby ground items with Grab All support.
Sandbox_EnableGroundCleanup_tooltip: Periodic server-side removal of ground items near players. Disabled by default.
Sandbox_GroundCleanupMinutes_tooltip: How often ground cleanup runs. Default 1440 = once per in-game day.
Sandbox_GroundCleanupScanRadius_tooltip: Tile radius around players to scan for ground items during cleanup.
Sandbox_GroundCleanupMaxZ_tooltip: Highest floor level (Z) to include in ground cleanup scans.
Sandbox_GroundCleanupMaxPerScan: Ground cleanup max items per scan
Sandbox_GroundCleanupMaxPerScan_tooltip: Maximum number of items removed per cleanup cycle to limit server load.
Sandbox_LogGroundCleanup_tooltip: Print ground cleanup activity to the server log for monitoring.
Sandbox_EnableItemWipeScheduler_tooltip: Periodically force-removes all dropped ground items near players. Countdown shown on the CSR Utility HUD. Disabled by default.
Sandbox_ItemWipeIntervalMinutes_tooltip: How often the forced item wipe runs, in real-world minutes (independent of in-game time speed). Default 360 = every 6 real hours. Min 15 (15 min), max 10080 (1 week).
Sandbox_ItemWipeWarnMinutes: Item wipe warning lead time (real-world minutes)
Sandbox_ItemWipeWarnMinutes_tooltip: Sends a one-time chat warning to all players when the upcoming wipe is this many real-world minutes away. Default 60 = warn 1 hour before. Set 0 to disable the warning.
Sandbox_EnableZombieDensityOverlay_toolt: Shows a colored grid of zombie density on the world map and a small movable 'Nearby Density' HUD on screen.
Sandbox_ZombieDensityCellRadius_tooltip: How many cells around the player to scan and draw on the world map. 1 = 3x3 grid (cheap), 2 = 5x5 (default), 3 = 7x7 (most coverage, highest cost).
Sandbox_EnableZombieDensityMinimap_toolt: This option no longer does anything. The minimap heat map was removed in v1.6.7 and replaced by the on-screen Nearby Density HUD widget for performance reasons.
Sandbox_EnableUtilityHud_tooltip: Draggable HUD panel with quick toggles and status info. Toggle with Numpad /.
Sandbox_EnableLootFilter_tooltip: Hide unwanted items across 15 categories. Toggle panel with Backslash key.
Sandbox_EnableVisualSoundCues_tooltip: Directional ring overlay showing nearby sounds categorized by source (zombie/vehicle/player).
Sandbox_EnableClipboardQoL_tooltip: Write and read checklists on clipboard items.
Sandbox_EnableItemInsightTooltips_toolti: Show extra info on item tooltips: freshness timers, condition, nutrition, drainable %, and duplicate warnings.
Sandbox_EnableSmartVehicleKeyLabels_tool: Auto-name vehicle keys based on the vehicle and allow renaming them.
Sandbox_EnableEatAllStack_tooltip: Right-click a food stack to eat the entire stack in one action.
Sandbox_EnableMagazineBatchActions_toolt: Load or unload all matching magazines at once.
Sandbox_EnableQuickDeviceToggle_tooltip: Turn radios and TVs on or off directly from the right-click context menu.
Sandbox_EnableQuickSit_tooltip: Sit on furniture or the ground with Numpad - key.
Sandbox_EnableWeaponHudOverlay_tooltip: Show ammo count pills on the hotbar, equipped panel, and aiming crosshair.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleClock_tooltip: Display a 12-hour clock on the vehicle dashboard.
Sandbox_EnableSweepTrash_tooltip: Use a broom and garbage bag to clean floor trash and debris tiles.
Sandbox_EnableSweepAshes_tooltip: Right-click a burnt-floor / ash pile while holding a broom to sweep it away. Has a chance to drop charcoal.
Sandbox_SweepAshesCharcoalChance_tooltip: Percent chance per swept ash pile to receive one charcoal. Default 33.
Sandbox_EnableFirework_tooltip: Craft and throw fireworks to create a 30-second zombie confusion zone with visual effects.
Sandbox_EnableBoltCutter_tooltip: Cut through metal gates, security doors, and garage doors with bolt cutters.
Sandbox_BoltCutSuccessMultiplier_tooltip: Scales bolt cutter success chance. 1.0 = normal.
Sandbox_EnableDualWield_tooltip: Left-hand unarmed punch follow-up attack. Experimental feature.
Sandbox_EnableAdvancedSoundOptions_toolt: Unlock PZ's hidden per-sound volume controls in the options menu.
Sandbox_EnableSawAllDropToGround: Saw All drops planks on ground
Sandbox_EnableSawAllDropToGround_tooltip: When enabled, Saw All Logs places planks at your feet instead of inventory. Useful for players without weight-reduction mods.
Sandbox_EnableStairSense_tooltip: Show a warning icon and text when zombies are detected above you on stairs.
Sandbox_EnableTowelDrying_tooltip: Allow players to use towels, sheets, and rags to dry off when wet.
Sandbox_EnableSleepAnywhere_tooltip: Allow players to sleep on the ground without a bed. Low quality sleep.
Sandbox_EnableDismantleAllWatches_toolti: Batch dismantle watches and alarm clocks into electronics scrap with a screwdriver.
Sandbox_EnableMassage_tooltip: Allow players to massage another player's strained muscles using butter or cooking oil.
Sandbox_EnableHideInFurniture_tooltip: Right-click closets, dumpsters, and fridges to hide inside. Zombies cannot see you while hiding.
Sandbox_EnablePointBlank_tooltip: Massive accuracy boost when aiming a firearm at a zombie within 2 tiles. Also applies bonus damage at point-blank range.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleSalvage_tooltip: Salvage abandoned vehicles for scrap metal and materials. Requires propane torch, welding mask, Mechanics 3+, Metal Welding 3+. Vehicle is destroyed on completion.
Sandbox_EnableItemRename_tooltip: Right-click any item to rename it. Names persist across saves. Use Reset Item Name to revert.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleHVAC_tooltip: Show a temperature slider on the vehicle dashboard for heating and cooling. Replaces the vanilla heater popup.
Sandbox_EnableCharacterInfoEnhancements_: Show a nutrition panel below the character screen with weight, calories, protein, carbs, and fats.
Sandbox_EnableVehicleRadio_tooltip: Replaces the vanilla radio popup with an always-visible radio panel on the dashboard. Volume knob (left) adjusts volume or toggles power on click. Tune knob (right) changes frequency. LCD shows station name and frequency.
Sandbox_EnableHideWatermark_tooltip: Remove the version/build watermark text from the screen.
Sandbox_EnableSleepBenefits_tooltip: While sleeping, boredom decreases by 1.5 and unhappiness decreases by 0.5 every 10 in-game minutes.
Sandbox_EnableBagBottomAttach_tooltip: Allow weapons like rifles, shovels, bats, and blades to visually attach to the bottom of backpacks (bedroll slots). Supports regular, big, and ALICE backpacks.
Sandbox_EnableNestedContainers_tooltip: Show containers inside containers as separate buttons in the inventory sidebar. A bag inside a backpack gets its own clickable button. Supports up to 2 levels of nesting.
Sandbox_EnableToolSet_tooltip: Craft combined tool items (tool roll, toolbox) that count as multiple tools at once. Uses engine-native tags so they work everywhere -- crafting, building, vehicle mechanics.
Sandbox_EnableBulletPenetration_tooltip: Bullets can pass through killed zombies and damage zombies behind them. Auto-detects weapon stats so it works with any gun mod.
Sandbox_BulletPenetrationMode_tooltip: Kill Only: bullets only penetrate when the initial hit kills the zombie. Non-Lethal: bullets can penetrate on any hit above a damage threshold.
Sandbox_BulletPenetrationDamageScale_too: Multiplier for penetration damage. 0.4 = penetrating bullets deal 40% of the original damage to the next zombie.
Sandbox_BulletPenetrationMaxTargets_tool: Maximum number of additional zombies a bullet can hit after the primary target.
Sandbox_EnableBack2Slot_tooltip: Adds a second weapon slot on the character's back. Carry two large weapons at once -- one on each shoulder.
Sandbox_EnableWarmUp_tooltip: Adds a context menu option to warm your hands when body temperature is below 36.6C and falling. Uses the vanilla hand-warming animation.
Sandbox_EnableStopDropRoll_tooltip: When on fire, a context menu option appears to drop and roll to extinguish flames. Damages clothing in the process. Lucky trait improves success, Unlucky makes it worse.
Sandbox_EnableConeVisionOutline_tooltip: Highlights zombies within your forward vision cone with a colored outline. Requires the vanilla melee outline option to be enabled in game settings.
Sandbox_ConeVisionOutlineRange_tooltip: Maximum distance in tiles for the zombie vision-cone outline. Higher values may impact performance.
Sandbox_ConeVisionOutlineColorR_tooltip: Red component of the vision-cone outline color. Default 178 (vibrant purple).
Sandbox_ConeVisionOutlineColorG_tooltip: Green component of the vision-cone outline color. Default 51 (vibrant purple).
Sandbox_ConeVisionOutlineColorB_tooltip: Blue component of the vision-cone outline color. Default 255 (vibrant purple).
Sandbox_ConeVisionOutlineAlpha_tooltip: Intensity / opacity of the vision-cone outline. 5 = very faint, 100 = fully opaque. Default 35.
Sandbox_EnableExerciseWithGear_tooltip: Prevents the fitness system from unequipping bags and clothing when exercising. Your character keeps all gear on.
Sandbox_EnableInfectionResilience_toolti: Gives zombie-infected players a small chance to survive the infection. The infection converts to a fever they can recover from.
Sandbox_InfResChanceToHeal_tooltip: Base percentage chance to survive a zombie infection. Reduced by the penalty multiplier for each infected body part. Default: 10%.
Sandbox_InfResPenaltyMultiplier_tooltip: Multiplier applied per infected body part. Higher values make multiple bites much harder to survive. Formula: chance / (penalty ^ parts). Default: 1.5.
Sandbox_InfResThresholdMin_tooltip: Minimum infection progression percentage before the survival roll can occur. Lower values mean the roll happens sooner. Default: 70%.
Sandbox_InfResThresholdMax_tooltip: Maximum infection progression percentage for the survival roll. A random threshold between min and max is chosen per infection. Default: 95%.
Sandbox_EnableUsefulBarrels_tooltip: Allows uncapping vanilla barrel objects with a pipe wrench, turning them into fluid containers that collect rain and can be filled or drained.
Sandbox_UsefulBarrelCapacity_tooltip: Maximum fluid capacity of an uncapped barrel in litres. Default: 400.
Sandbox_EnableClimbWithBags_tooltip: Keep bags in your hands when climbing through windows or over fences. Heavier bags increase climb time.
Sandbox_EnableFieldFilters_tooltip: Allows crafting makeshift respirator and gas mask filters from common materials. Also enables the filter lifespan multiplier.
Sandbox_FilterLifespanMultiplier_tooltip: How many times longer ALL mask filters last. 1 = vanilla speed (default). 10 = filters last 10x as long.
Sandbox_EnableTowAssist_tooltip: Adds a forward impulse boost to vehicles while towing, reducing sluggishness. Force scales with both vehicle masses. Auto-disabled when Realistic Car Physics is active (incompatible impulse stacking).
Sandbox_TowAssistStandardFactor_tooltip: Force multiplier for standard vehicles while towing. 0 = disabled. Default: 5.0.
Sandbox_TowAssistHeavyDutyFactor_tooltip: Force multiplier for heavy-duty vehicles while towing. 0 = disabled. Default: 7.0.
Sandbox_TowAssistSportFactor_tooltip: Force multiplier for sport vehicles while towing. 0 = disabled. Default: 4.0.
Sandbox_EnableGeneratorInfo_tooltip: Enhanced generator info window with fuel time remaining, fuel gauge bar, and purple power range overlay when carrying or inspecting a generator.
Sandbox_EnableWearableSlotFix_tooltip: Moves ear muffs and ear protectors from the Hat slot to the Ears slot so they can be worn with hats, helmets, and other headwear.
Sandbox_EnableClimbWithGenerator_tooltip: Allows climbing through windows, over fences, and up/down sheet ropes while holding a generator. Applies a heavy time penalty based on generator weight.
Sandbox_EnableNoticeBoard_tooltip: Read and write messages on paper notices and whiteboards in the world. Requires a pen or marker.
Sandbox_EnableVideoInsert_tooltip: Adds 'Insert Video' and 'Eject Video' context menu options when near a TV or VCR. Insert shows all compatible VHS tapes or DVDs in your inventory.
Sandbox_EnableTVRadial: Enable TV / VCR / Radio radial menu
Sandbox_EnableTVRadial_tooltip: Press the TV Radial hotkey (default Numpad 9, rebindable) near a TV, VCR, or radio to open a controller-friendly radial menu with Power, Volume +/-, and Insert/Eject controls.
Sandbox_EnableAnimatedDuffles: Animated duffel bags on lower back
Sandbox_EnableAnimatedDuffles_tooltip: When ON (default), large duffel-class bags (Duffel, Weapon, Tool, Police, SWAT, Sheriff, Military, Medical, etc.) gain a right-click "Equip on Back > Equip on Lower Back" option that places the bag on a separate Lower Back slot using a 3D rigged model that animates with your character. This frees the upper Back slot for a backpack. Disable to remove the menu entry.
Sandbox_EnableAimingAmmoCursor_tooltip: Shows a floating ammo pill near your cursor while aiming. Toggle independently from the main Weapon HUD Overlay.
Sandbox_EnableAimingHealthCursor_tooltip: Shows a small HP pill near your cursor while aiming. Color shifts from green to violet as you take damage.
Sandbox_EnableAimingDensityCursor_toolti: Shows a nearby zombie count pill near your cursor while aiming. Default OFF to avoid duplicating the standalone Nearby Density HUD.
Sandbox_EnableGearSling_tooltip: Adds a second equip slot for sling-style and shoulder bags, so you can carry a satchel, duffel, or chest rig alongside your main backpack.
Sandbox_EnableColoredToggles_tooltip: When ON, the CSR Settings panel (S button on the Utility HUD) renders ON toggles green and OFF toggles red. When OFF, falls back to vanilla button styling. Does not affect the vanilla Sandbox Options screen.
Sandbox_EnableSurvivorLedger_tooltip: Displays a compact strip of survival statistics on screen: days survived, zombie kills, distance traveled, character weight, session kills, and average kills per day.
Sandbox_EnableLadderClimb_tooltip: Lets players climb vanilla world ladders by reusing the engine's sheet-rope state machine. Press the Interact key while standing at the foot or top of a ladder. Disable to fall back to vanilla behaviour. Cooperative no-op if another ladder mod is loaded.
Sandbox_CSR_DebugBagDrop_tooltip: Diagnostic only. When ON, prints a trace to the console each time the player attempts to drag-drop an item from the loot window onto a bag icon on the inventory side panel. Used to investigate the bug where the drop is not accepted. Leave OFF unless asked by a developer.
